# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - kind: ServerAuthorization
          name: frontend-to-backend
          namespace: backend
        - kind: ServerAuthorization
          name: frontend-to-auth
          namespace: auth
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - kind: ServerAuthorization
          name: backend-to-database
          namespace: database
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: auth
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - kind: ServerAuthorization
          name: auth-to-frontend
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  subject:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: frontend-sa
    namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth
  namespace: auth
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
    namespace: auth
  subject:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: frontend-sa
    namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  subject:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: backend-sa
    namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-to-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  subject:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: auth-sa
    namespace: auth
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: database
spec:
  port: 5432
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - kind: ServerAuthorization
          name: database-to-backend
          namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  subject:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: backend-sa
    namespace: backend
